sections.title: The Curse of the Allflame Challenge League

rows.neu: Corsair captain; Charts → board → dive seafloor; Allflame lanterns shield waves
Connect charted areas into one giant seafloor excursion; replay to amplify rewards
Feed item → splits into ghostly outcomes; keep one
Warp/twist items 'in ways not seen in centuries'
Standard / Hardcore / SSF; HC parented to Standard
40 new (+8 Ruthless); Totem Pole from challenge 19+

Int/Str skill — lower mana cost; block releases arcane wave
Transfigured — holy beam → lingering orb w/ larger explosions
Transfigured — consumes Power Charges → outward hammer spiral
Transfigured — waves of holy hammers for a duration
Transfigured — blood scythe; up to 5 Blood Charges
Keywording + popup pinning ported; rolled out gradually
Party can use Expedition Detonator, Eldritch Altars, Harvest Plots, Sentinels
Volatile Vaal Orbs & Crystallised Rancour get dedicated slots
Isla / Niko / Einhar can now Identify items
Available in every Town from Act 2
Act 3 onward; guaranteed in Sceptre of God, Grand Arena, The Ridge, Hidden Underbelly (no Rucksacks there)
To area level (max 68); equip lvl capped by find-area

No Transmutation/Augmentation orbs in Map rucksacks
base / of Infamy / of Renown / of Surprising Alliances

Renamed; one pit spawns Abyssal Consort
4 in Domain; Enshrouded → another Unique + Vestigial implicit
Removed → converted to regular Timeless Emblems
All: +10% XP, +20% reward, +10% dmg, +10% toughness; faction bonus per revive
More on average; non-Sgt/non-General no longer drop
Lower chance, higher stack size; Map Qty effect lowered
+10% Quality if gem colour matches socket
White (small chance R/G/B by item lvl)
Rarer; no longer sold for Jeweller's; Exchange gold fee up
Removed → now turns a random White socket Non-White
→ Omen of Trichromatism (guarantees R+G+B on Chromatic)

From Bestiary Bosses or Black Mórrigan craft (out of core pool)
Reroll base (keep mods) / Imprint of Rare Talisman
Point to next Altar after one
Leaders no longer drop; Mastermind → Kulemak only
Strange locations post-Voidstone; no Map item needed
Now in own Anomaly areas (not random in maps)

28 (Arachnid Nest, Basilica, Bazaar, Caldera, Cells, Channel, Colonnade, Colosseum, Conservatory, Crystal Ore, Desert, Desert Spring, Estuary, Forbidden Woods, Geode, Infested Valley, Laboratory, Malformation, Museum, Phantasmagoria, Pier, Plateau, Ramparts, Stagnation, Sunken City, Temple, Toxic Sewer, Vault)

28 (Acid Caverns, Arena, Ashen Wood, Bog, Canyon, Carcass, Castle Ruins, Courtyard, Coves, Crimson Temple, Crimson Township, Cursed Crypt, Defiled Cathedral, Dig, Dry Sea, Dungeon, Lava Chamber, Lighthouse, Maze, Moon Temple, Mud Geyser, Necropolis, Pen, Racecourse, Sepulchre, Underground Sea, Wasteland, Wharf)

Connects to Forge of Phoenix, Pit of Chimera, Lair of Hydra

Stores drop-Map; Scry its Div cards onto an Atlas Map
Lowered — none exceed a Meatsack (Unholy Aberrations, Originator, Refinery robots)
No longer pause (big DPS: Zombies, Golems, SRS, Skeletons, Dom Blow)
New keyword replacing 'spell dmg applies to attack dmg' (descriptive)
+10% Mark Eff/Power Charge, 3% instant Leech/Power Charge
Spell Crit Bifurcates + 50% less spell crit
NEW (req. Virtue): base spell crit = main-hand
NEW (req. Vile Bastion/Forbidden Power): Spirit Infusion while channelling
Buffed spells grow more per level (Divine Ire 27%→37% @30)
Cold/Phys higher crit; Fire lower crit; Lightning faster/+”mana; Fire cheaper
No longer supports skills with Cooldowns
24–28% less dmg taken if only minion
→ Communion; Spell hits only; +20–30 phys/minion; 150% mult

→ Fracture 2 mods on Rare Talisman (≥6 mods)

Up to 200% max tier; lower tiers more common
